findings.description: The private method `getWindowScopeObject` is omitted from the Java code example. The source includes its signature, Javadoc comment ("更新対象ユーザの検索結果を設定したFormを返す"), parameter descriptions, and the explanatory comment `// 【説明】検索結果を設定したFormを返すメソッド`. While the method body is truncated in the source (～中略～), the method signature and description establish that it converts SqlResultSet results into a W11AC03Form — part of the overall implementation pattern.
findings.source_evidence: private W11AC03Form getWindowScopeObject(SqlResultSet sysAcct, SqlResultSet users, SqlResultSet permissionUnit, SqlResultSet ugroup) { W11AC03Form userForm = new W11AC03Form(); // ～中略～ return userForm; } — with Javadoc: "更新対象ユーザの検索結果を設定したFormを返す"

findings.description: RST-specific `:download:` syntax is embedded verbatim inside the markdown table cells (e.g., `:download:\`W11AC03Action.java<./_source/download/W11AC03Action.java>\``). This syntax is not valid markdown and will not render as links in any markdown environment. The file names remain readable as plain text, but the links are non-functional.
findings.source_evidence: Source uses RST :download: directives; knowledge file reproduces them as-is inside markdown table cells instead of converting them to plain filenames or markdown links.

findings.description: The hints for s7 do not include `W11AC03Action` (the class whose implementation is shown in s7) or `doRW11AC0301` (the specific action method implemented in the code block). Users or retrieval systems searching for these identifiers may not reach s7, which contains their implementation.
findings.source_evidence: Source: `public class W11AC03Action extends DbAccessSupport { ... public HttpResponse doRW11AC0301(HttpRequest req, ExecutionContext ctx) { ... } }` — both identifiers appear in the code shown in s7 but are absent from s7's hints array.
